sub_modules.sqrt_nr_input_classify: Combinational zero-input detector for immediate square-root completion.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_initial_guess: Combinational fixed-point initial estimate selector for Newton-Raphson iteration.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_fixed_divide: Combinational fixed-point division block computing scaled X divided by current estimate.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iteration_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson averaging step producing the next square-root estimate.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_convergence: Combinational convergence detector comparing consecutive estimates.
sub_modules.sqrt_nr_iter_limit: Combinational iteration-limit detector for bounded latency.
